title: polycardia lateralis
intro: Polycardia lateralis, also known as Polycardia, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polycardia lateralis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Polycardia lateralis is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the herbal preparation typically involving the leaves and stems of the plant.
